installConfigs.instructions: Replace <huggingface-access-token> with a Hugging Face access token (https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens). The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' and is used to access gated models, your spaces, and personal collections. To use OAuth login instead, change serverUrl to https://huggingface.co/mcp?login and remove the serverAuthToken.

Replace <huggingface-access-token> with a Hugging Face access token (https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens). The token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' and is used to access gated models, your spaces, and personal collections. To use OAuth login instead, change serverUrl to https://huggingface.co/mcp?login and remove the serverAuthToken.
